predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company (kleine vennootschap) in the given financial year.

predicates.name: is_subsidiary
predicates.description: The company is a subsidiary (dochtervennootschap) of another company.

predicates.name: is_parent_company
predicates.description: The company is a parent company (moedervennootschap) of another company.

predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual average employee threshold of 10 in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover threshold of 900,000 EUR (excluding VAT) in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold of 450,000 EUR in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the three micro-company criteria in the given financial year.

predicates.name: previous_financial_year
predicates.description: The second argument is the financial year immediately preceding the first argument.

predicates.name: next_financial_year
predicates.description: The second argument is the financial year immediately following the first argument.

predicates.name: is_micro_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a micro-company (microvennootschap) under Art. 1:25 in the given financial year. Determined solely by conditions observable on the company and that financial year, without requiring a witness year variable in the conclusion.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover of the company excluding VAT in the financial year, in EUR.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company at the balance sheet date of the financial year, in EUR.
